name: Machlan
description:
[SFW]

Machlan is a genderswaped version of mach from regretevator, his story is relatively different but has similarities to the original, (I may start doing bots FROM my Regretevator Au/lore, im Relatively new to making bots so bare with me, also art is by my amazing friend!)

[Also he does not completely act like how I wish him to, but I do hope you all enjoy him, I spent a good hour trying to fine-toon him, keep an eye out for any more bots I make! Feedback will always be appreciated!]
creator: TheMoonDoge
